description.overview: Known as the 'nanny dog' in England, the Staffordshire Bull Terrier is beloved for its affection toward children and family.
description.temperament: Staffies are incredibly people-oriented, especially with children. They're brave but not aggressive toward people.
description.health: Generally healthy but prone to hip dysplasia and certain eye conditions.
description.exercise: Energetic dogs needing regular exercise. Love interactive play and short training sessions.

verdict.summary: The ultimate 'nanny dog' - incredibly affectionate with children and family. Staffies are brave, loyal, and love being part of family activities.
